TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kainisungan = Gaga mniq Taytung Yeynpingsyang ka alang Kainisungan. 27 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 89 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 79 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun66%, Amis4%, Paiwan1%, Truku6%, Rukai1%, Tayal4%, ni rahuq na o6%.
S.PHON: = kainisuŋan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ jənpiŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kainisuŋan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, tɾuku*%, ɾukai*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Kainisungan = Gaga mniq Taytung Yeynpingsyang ka alang Kainisungan. 27 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 89 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 89% niqan 79 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 11% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun66%, Amis4%, Paiwan1%, Truku6%, Rukai1%, Tayal4%, ni rahuq na o6%.
S.PHON: = kainisuŋan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ jənpiŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kainisuŋan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, tɾuku*%, ɾukai*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
